# Authoritative Assertion Coverage Report
**Date:** 2026-05-13  
**Generated by:** governance_enforcement_trace.py --days 30

---

## Coverage Summary (Last 30 Days)

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Window | 2026-04-13 to 2026-05-13 |
| Total sent drafts | 984 |
| Covered by send_path assertions | 23 (2.3%) |
| Not covered (no send_path assertion) | 961 (97.7%) |
| Send-path assertion failures | 3 |
| Advisory draft_gen assertions (window) | 17,880 |

**Governance status: CRITICAL (historical) — forward-looking coverage now established.**

---

## Why Coverage Is 2.3%

The `assertion_context="send_path"` parameter was implemented in `engagement.py` recently. All prior sends (before 2026-05-13) did not pass this parameter, so they logged assertions as `draft_gen` even though they were delivery-path calls. The 961 uncovered sends are historical and cannot be retroactively remediated.

Today (2026-05-13), 13 sends occurred with full send_path coverage. Going forward, every send will have authoritative coverage.

---

## Send-Path Assertion Failures (3 total)

All 3 failures were `no_recent_company_send` violations caught at delivery time. These are the correct governance behavior: drafts that were approved but whose contact had already been emailed within the 30-day cooldown window. All 3 were blocked and rolled back.

| Contact | Assertion | Evaluated At | Outcome |
|---|---|---|---|
| dcc28580 | no_recent_company_send | 2026-05-13 14:50 | Blocked, rolled back |
| 95865dbb | no_recent_company_send | 2026-05-13 14:50 | Blocked, rolled back |
| 6141733f | no_recent_company_send | 2026-05-13 14:50 | Blocked, rolled back |

These are governance successes, not failures.

---

## Forward Coverage Projection

With `assertion_context="send_path"` confirmed present in engagement.py:

- Every future send will have `send_path` assertions logged
- bounce_rate_ok runs at batch level (one assertion per send batch tick)
- Per-contact assertions: ~9 records per send (email_deliverable, email_status_verified, email_name_consistent, outreach_eligible, persona_target, no_recent_company_send, sender_daily_cap, and for step 2+: prior_step_sent, minimum_step_gap)

---

## Monitoring Recommendation

Run `python governance_enforcement_trace.py --days 7` weekly. Expected healthy output:

```
Covered by send_path assertions: X  (>= 95%)
Governance status: HEALTHY
```

If coverage drops below 95%: investigate engagement.py for code changes that removed the `assertion_context` parameter.
